feed.title: enterpriseai.tools weekly updates — platforms
feed.subtitle: High-impact market intelligence for enterprise AI tooling, with an expandable release log for lower-signal product changes.

entry.title: Amazon Bedrock — market-event
entry.summary: AWS announced Claude Fable 5 on Amazon Bedrock, then updated the notice to say Anthropic asked AWS to revoke access to Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 under a US export-control directive.

source.title: AWS announces Claude Fable 5, the first generally available Mythos-class model

entry.title: Microsoft Foundry — feature
entry.summary: Microsoft announced Foundry Managed Compute, adding a managed GPU platform for hosting open-source and custom models through the same Foundry endpoint, SDKs, and billing surface used for frontier-model deployments.

source.title: Announcing Foundry Managed Compute: Run open models in Microsoft Foundry

entry.title: Amazon Bedrock — model-addition
entry.summary: AWS added Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8 to Amazon Bedrock, giving Bedrock customers access to Anthropic's latest high-end model inside AWS-managed security and regional controls.

source.title: Claude Opus 4.8 is now available on AWS

entry.title: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform — deprecation
entry.summary: Google deprecated Vertex AI Extensions and said the service will shut down after 2026-11-26, directing teams to migrate agent integrations to Agent Platform to avoid disruption.

entry.title: Google Vertex AI — model-addition
entry.summary: Google announced Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite general availability on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, adding a lower-latency, lower-cost production model option for agent and orchestration workloads.

source.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is now generally available

entry.title: Microsoft Foundry — feature
entry.summary: Foundry Local 1.1 added live transcription, embeddings, and Responses API support, expanding Microsoft’s local/no-cloud deployment path for speech, RAG, and tool-calling workloads.

source.title: Foundry Local 1.1: Live Transcription, Embeddings, and Responses API
